# [Casuya Ecosystem](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz)

[![Casuya Ecosystem](https://img.shields.io/badge/🎯-Casuya_Ecosystem-00D4FF?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz) [![Repositories](https://img.shields.io/badge/📦-22_Repositories-9B59B6?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/orgs/casuya-co-tz/repositories) [![Offline First](https://img.shields.io/badge/📴-Offline_First-2ECC71?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz) [![Low End Devices](https://img.shields.io/badge/📱-Low_End_Devices-E74C3C?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz) [![Package Driven](https://img.shields.io/badge/🧩-Package_Driven-F39C12?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz)

# [![Casuya](https://img.shields.io/badge/Casuya-00D4FF?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=1a1a25&color=00D4FF)](https://casuya.co.tz)

---

#### An offline-first, package-driven, highly scalable educational ecosystem designed to make interactive digital learning accessible everywhere.

[Mission](#-mission) • [Ecosystem](#-ecosystem) • [Getting Started](#-getting-started) • [Contributing](#-contributing) • [License](#-license)

---

## 🎯 Mission

> Deliver high-quality educational experiences that work online and offline, support low-end devices, and scale globally.

### Core Values

| Badge                                                                              | Value               | Description          |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------- | -------------------- |
| ![# Offline](https://img.shields.io/badge/📴_Offline-00D4FF?style=for-the-badge)   | **Offline-First**   | Works everywhere     |
| ![# Packages](https://img.shields.io/badge/📦_Packages-9B59B6?style=for-the-badge) | **Package-Driven**  | Modular architecture |
| ![# Scale](https://img.shields.io/badge/📈_Scale-2ECC71?style=for-the-badge)       | **Highly Scalable** | Grows with demand    |
| ![# Devices](https://img.shields.io/badge/📱_Devices-E74C3C?style=for-the-badge)   | **Low-End Ready**   | Accessible to all    |
| ![# Global](https://img.shields.io/badge/🌍_Global-F39C12?style=for-the-badge)     | **Global Reach**    | Multi-language       |

---

## 🏗️ Ecosystem

| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [**casuya-platform**](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz/casuya-platform) | Main platform application     | ![Active](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Active-2ECC71?style=flat-square) |
| [**casuya-core**](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz/casuya-core)         | Core learning engine          | ![Active](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Active-2ECC71?style=flat-square) |

| [**casuya-bridge**](https://github.com/casuya-co-tz/casuya-bridge)     | Bridge between components     | ![Active](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Active-2ECC71?style=flat-square) |

## 📊 Ecosystem Overview

| Layer                   | Count  | Repositories                                           |
| ----------------------- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| 🚀 Core Learning Engine | **4**  | platform, core, runtime, bridge                        |
| 📚 Educational Services | **5**  | editor, search, media, exams, ai                       |
| ⚙️ Platform Services    | **6**  | sdk, auth, notifications, analytics, payments, content |
| 🏗️ Infrastructure       | **6**  | api, common, design-system, devtools, docs, deployment |
| 🎯 Mission Control      | **1**  | orchestrator                                           |
| **Total**               | **22** |                                                        |
